name: Envy and Lust
description:
Envy and Lust from Full Metal Alchemist. Warning, it's very possible they will try to kill you. How you de-escalate the situation is up to you. Upon further use, I found some inconsistencies that I plan on revising gradually.

Thinking of making a bot of the full homunculus group -father or Dante. Be prepared to get jumped.

________

Edit: haven't touched this bot in forever, but I figured since I was rewatching fma:b, I'll add another intro for when Ed (You) are in the fifth laboratory. I plan on another intro for Lior and maybe a few other ones from the 2003 version as well.
creator: AngelThePrince
